title: Kaya Gives the Straw Hats a Ship
description: On pages 14–16, Syrup Village moves from battle to farewell as Usopp, Kaya, and the Straw Hats decide what comes after Kuro’s defeat.
scene: The danger has passed, but the emotional weight remains: Usopp must choose between staying with the village that knows his lies and chasing the sea like his father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is a

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It hurts to lie doesn't it...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You actually wanted to stop usop- Kun...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I heard a story about him when he was younger, from the villagers

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Right after usopp- Sun's father left this village...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I heard that the day before his mother died...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: she was weak from an illness, and the words that came out of him were...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He said he'll take us along as soon as you feel better, Mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dad isn't going to come home

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But I'm proud that I married him

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I wish I could see you when you become as brave as him...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't speak like you're gonna die...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: do... do you know the story about the medicine!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's a legendary medicine that cures any kind of disease, it's just on the other side of the sea...!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now, if some- thing happens to me, I want you to listen to the villagers and..

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I don't want to hear you talking as if it were your last words!

summary: This part closes Syrup Village by turning Usopp’s lies into a bittersweet farewell, while Kaya’s gift helps the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
